questions.prompt: What does the cleanup function returned by useEffect do?
questions.explanation: The cleanup function runs before the component unmounts and before each re-run of the effect.
options: Runs before the component unmounts and before each re-run
Runs only when the component unmounts
Runs immediately after the effect setup
It is optional and never executes
questions.answer: Runs before the component unmounts and before each re-run

questions.prompt: Passing an empty dependency array [] to useEffect makes it run only once after mount.
questions.explanation: An empty deps array means the effect has no reactive dependencies, so it only runs after the initial mount.
Omitting the dependency array causes the effect to run after every render. Add a dependency array or use a guard condition.
